# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Michael Burry calls prediction markets gambling, regardless of framing](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/michael-burry-calls-prediction-markets-gambling-regardless-of-framing.html): Michael Burry, the investor famous for predicting the 2008 housing collapse, publicly dismissed prediction markets as gambling in name only, according to Business Insider.
- [Polymarket Opens Michigan Governor Race Odds to Public Bettors](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-opens-michigan-governor-race-odds-to-public-bettors.html): Polymarket has launched a prediction market on the 2026 Michigan gubernatorial race, allowing traders worldwide to stake positions on which candidate will win the governorship.
- [Kalshi Pro Trading Terminal Targets High-Volume Prediction Market Users](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-pro-trading-terminal-targets-high-volume-prediction-market-users.html): Kalshi is launching a professional trading terminal designed for its most active prediction market traders, according to a report by qz.com.
- [Kalshi secures $30M investment from ETF XOVR in prediction market bet](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-secures-30m-investment-from-etf-xovr-in-prediction-market-bet.html): ETF issuer XOVR committed $30 million to prediction market exchange Kalshi as a private market investment, expanding its strategy of backing high-growth alternative asset firms.
- [Kalshi Pro Launches Multi-Market Dashboard for Active Traders](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-pro-launches-multi-market-dashboard-for-active-traders.html): Kalshi has officially launched Kalshi Pro, a new platform tier designed for high-volume traders who simultaneously manage positions across multiple event-contract markets.
- [LA Therapists Report Rise in Youth Gambling Tied to Kalshi](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/la-therapists-report-rise-in-youth-gambling-tied-to-kalshi.html): Los Angeles-area therapists are reporting an increase in young patients presenting with gambling problems, and they are pointing to prediction-markets platform Kalshi as a contributing factor.
- [Kalshi Pro launches multi-market trading and perpetual futures for power users](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-pro-launches-multi-market-trading-and-perpetual-futures-for-power-users.html): Kalshi launched a new 'Pro' product, reported by CNBC, giving sophisticated users the ability to trade multiple prediction markets simultaneously alongside perpetual futures contracts.
- [Ninth Circuit grills Kalshi on sports contracts vs. betting in tribal lands appeal](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/ninth-circuit-grills-kalshi-on-sports-contracts-vs-betting-in-tribal-lands-appea.html): A Ninth Circuit panel pressed Kalshi lawyers in oral arguments to explain why its sports event contracts differ legally from sports betting under the Indian Gaming Regulatory Act in a tribal lands appeal.
- [Ninth Circuit hears Kalshi tribal gaming classification dispute](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/ninth-circuit-hears-kalshi-tribal-gaming-classification-dispute.html): The Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals took up a legal challenge examining whether Kalshi's event contracts constitute tribal gaming activity, in a case with sweeping implications for prediction market regulation.
- [Gibraltar launches world's first dedicated prediction markets regulatory framework](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/gibraltar-launches-world-s-first-dedicated-prediction-markets-regulatory-framewo.html): Gibraltar became the first jurisdiction globally to establish a standalone regulatory regime exclusively for prediction markets, creating a bespoke licensing framework separate from existing gambling or financial-services rules.
